name: 13q31_1_GPC5_SD
description: 13q31.3 GPC5/GPC6 glypican cluster flanked by intronic-and-intergenic SDs of 5-30 kb at 93-98% identity. Recurrent ~1-3 Mb microdeletions and microduplications encompassing GPC5 have been reported in nephrotic syndrome susceptibility and intellectual-disability cohorts. GPC5 is also the locus of childhood-onset SSNS GWAS signal.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic SD pairs of 5-30 kb at ~96% identity flanking GPC5 and within the GPC5-GPC6 intergenic region; sparse but conserved.
